content:
Test Article Body

This is a test article added directly into blogPosts.json.

If you can see this page live on the site, it means the automated article page system is working correctly.

Why this matters

It means future articles do not need new React pages creating manually.

They simply need to be added into the JSON file and GitHub will handle the rebuild and deployment.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is this a live test article?
Yes. This article is being used to confirm that GitHub deployment and blog page creation are working correctly.

Does blogPosts.json create pages automatically?
Yes. Each article object added to blogPosts.json can be rendered automatically by the existing Blog and BlogPost React files.
